feature: CLI ergonomics: short alias -l for --last in trend command
evidence: 1 new integration test in tests/test_trend_command_history.py: test_trend_command_last_short_alias verifies that -l is correctly recognized as alias for --last and that the output contains the expected day-window label. Full regression suite: 1159 passed, 48 skipped.

trend_command.impact: Added -l as short alias for --last / days option, consistent with existing -r (repo) and -c (config) short aliases

test_coverage.impact: New test verifies alias recognition via CliRunner
